events.label: reasoning
events.text: The rotor thickness is 28.4 mm, stamped minimum thickness is 26.0 mm. 28.4 > 26.0, so within tolerance. Pads seated with hardware and shims, guide pins lubed, lug nuts torqued to 103 ft-lb in star pattern, road test normal. All looks good.
